opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My joints are screaming in pain, it's moving from my wrists to my knees, and I'm so exhausted I physically can't stand up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It flared today after I'd missed some of my autoimmune condition tablets and I'm terrified my organs are involved.

symptom_narrative.character: severe migratory joint pain (wrists, knuckles, knees) with profound fatigue
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: migratory joint pain and fatigue; no chest pain on breathing, no breathlessness, no cola/red urine, no new facial rash/mouth ulcers, no single hot red joint, no high fever
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: non-erosive autoimmune condition arthritis, usually controlled on hydroxychloroquine

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: systemic autoimmune condition (mild joint type), on hydroxychloroquine
past_medical_history.how_managed: hydroxychloroquine (missed doses over the last week)

objective_data_offered.value: my wrists, knuckles and knees are tender and sore to move but not bright red or hugely swollen; no single joint is hot/red; my urine looks normal colour
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-report/video; cannot examine the chest/heart or test urine/bloods remotely
